use_cases: Display device battery levels in a smart home or IoT dashboard
Show charging progress with animated wave visualization
Monitor battery status of multiple connected devices
Create a mobile device management interface
Build a battery health monitoring widget for system utilities
ai_summary: A battery status card component featuring an animated wave visualization that displays device name, battery level percentage, and charging status. Built with React and shadcn/ui patterns, it includes smooth CSS transitions and a dynamic battery fill indicator. Ideal for device management dashboards, IoT monitoring systems, and smart home interfaces requiring real-time battery visualization.
